gap_analysis_summary: Most of the spec is already implemented. The single genuine gap is missing TestDeleteCommand behavioral tests in test_ipc_handler.py.

key_files.relevance: handle_delete implementation (lines 594-671): fully implemented, thread-safe, idempotent, soft-delete via _deleted_indices set
Has TestAcceptCommand (4 tests) and TestAbortCommand (4 tests) but NO TestDeleteCommand. Gap to fill.
Has index management tests and TestHandleGetImageList but no handle_delete behavioral tests
DeleteCommand (index: int), DeleteAckEvent (index: int), AcceptedEvent (paths, display_paths) all defined
accept_all(), accept_from_preview(), delete_preview(), save_to_preview() all implemented
handleDeleteAck splices imageList, deleteCurrentImage sends by index. Frontend DOES handle delete_ack (line 247). No image_list case in handleMessage.

patterns.name: Soft-delete via _deleted_indices
patterns.description: Images are never removed from _image_index_map; only added to _deleted_indices. ACCEPT filters on idx not in _deleted_indices.

patterns.name: Cleanup outside lock
patterns.description: Lock is acquired for index bookkeeping, released, then cleanup() called outside lock.

patterns.name: Idempotent DELETE_ACK
patterns.description: DELETE always responds with DELETE_ACK regardless of whether index was found or already deleted.

patterns.name: TestCommand pattern
patterns.description: Each command has a Test{CommandName} class in test_ipc_handler.py with 3-5 behavioral tests.

already_implemented: handle_accept with multi-image support in handler.py
spec.md sections 3.2, 5.3 updated to backend-index delete semantics
genuine_gaps: TestDeleteCommand class is missing from test_ipc_handler.py. handle_delete has no behavioral tests. Spec testing considerations explicitly require: delete removes temp file, idempotent delete, delete then accept excludes deleted image.

testing.python_test_runner: pytest with uv (source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest)
testing.test_conventions: Test classes named Test{CommandName}, methods named test_{what}_{outcome}
testing.mock_pattern: Mock(spec=TextbrushBackend) for backend, Mock() for server with .send Mock
testing.real_files: tmp_path fixture for real filesystem paths in cleanup tests
testing.hypothesis: @settings(deadline=None) for any IO or threading tests

conventions: CLAUDE.md: ALWAYS check linting with ruff after finishing an increment
CLAUDE.md: NEVER run integration tests without user confirmation
index: int (not image_id: string) is the canonical DELETE identifier throughout
